title: image: make sure we don't try to use zstd compression
body: Don't try to use zstd to compress layers until we know what MIME type to use to describe layers that are compressed with zstd.

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 4348460 has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=TomSweeneyRedHat 4348460f70c41dcdbbdf8248f8fb09194a9c6112 -->
LGTM, the MIME type should just include a suffix +zstd (https://github.com/containers/image/pull/639#issuecomment-505473848)

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/4ae0e14ea8a9ed47fb07351fe7ab23ca0554fc01.1563415006452700416/index.html), [status-travis](https://travis-ci.org/containers/buildah/builds/560276161?utm_source=github_status&utm_medium=notification)
